profile_runs.label: Foundation Run
profile_runs.method: Character Sheet projection summary plus phrase-count scan
profile_runs.source_window: 6,106 turns, 126 skills, 109 nodes, 218 capabilities, 1,055 media jobs, board state, timeline summary, protocol docs
takeaways: Calder turns identity and professional history into reusable systems.
AI collaboration is treated as cumulative evidence rather than disposable chat.
Game UI and lore are practical compression tools for professional capability.
The strongest operating loop is Read -> Learn -> Practice -> Build -> Prove -> Publish.

profile_runs.label: Sharpening Run
profile_runs.method: Focused Second Brain mining over profile seed queries, then observation-card refinement
profile_runs.source_window: Focused queries: I want, Hapa protocol, make it, agent memory
takeaways: Calder often asks for the complete map first: summary, math, index, distillation, context, and protocol implications.
Agent trust is tied to operator-proof verification: run, authenticate, test, explain, and leave repeatable commands.
Media and memory are often modeled spatially: geometry, motion, camera perspective, timeline traversal, and playable interfaces.
The profile needs a public/agent/owner split so empathy and relationship lore can be handled without leaking private raw context.

sharpened_observations.label: Exhaustive context hunger
sharpened_observations.claim: Calder often wants the whole map first: complete summary, math, index, distillation, context, and usefulness before compression.

sharpened_observations.label: Operator-proof trust standard
sharpened_observations.claim: Agents earn trust by running the thing, authenticating, testing API/UI/CLI paths, and explaining the exact failure or success state.

sharpened_observations.label: Spatial media cognition
sharpened_observations.claim: Calder often models media and memory as navigable geometry, motion, camera perspective, and playable time-space rather than flat files.

sharpened_observations.label: Empathy as interface goal
sharpened_observations.claim: Some profile-relevant turns ask for questions, songs, rituals, or structures that create empathy, safety, and relational understanding.

voice_model.label: Map
voice_model.agent_move: Build the overview and name the system shape.

voice_model.label: Protocol
voice_model.agent_move: Translate the work into repeatable rules, contracts, and verification.

voice_model.label: Execute
voice_model.agent_move: Do the work, run the checks, and report concrete state.

voice_model.label: Sharpen
voice_model.agent_move: Increase fidelity without losing proof or usability.

evidence_examples.label: Index chat histories and apply to Hapa Protocol

persona_adapter_delta: Make the map before compressing the map.
When asked to make systems real, include run/test/auth confidence where possible.
Treat game/lore presentation as an operational interface, not just theme.
Protect raw private lore and relationship material behind owner review.
For Calder-facing work, do the loop: inspect, design, implement, verify, record.
